findings.purpose: Main CLI entry point — parses argv, resolves command dispatch, runs init/doctor/settings/harness/sync
findings.evidence: Compiled to dist/cli.js (7815 bytes). package.json bin: 7 entries all → dist/cli.js. Line 10 imports syncRuntimeSurface. Line 169-171 calls it for 'sync' command.

findings.purpose: Resolves binary name and positional args to CLI command; maps hm-sync→sync alias
findings.evidence: Compiled to dist/cli/command-routing.js. Line 4: CLI_COMMANDS includes 'sync'. Line 14: 'hm-sync': 'sync' alias.

findings.purpose: Thin re-export barrel for initProject from features/runtime-entry
findings.evidence: Single re-export line. dist/cli/init.js exists. Harmless at 2 lines.

findings.purpose: Sync bridge wrapper — passes hardcoded package constants to syncRuntimeSurface
findings.evidence: Compiled to dist/cli/runtime-assets.js (811 bytes). Sole direct importer of sync.ts. Called by cli.ts:170, init.handler.ts:126, doctor.ts:99.

findings.purpose: Init handler — bootstraps workflow authority, trajectory ledger, recovery, governance, and calls sync
findings.evidence: Compiled to dist/features/runtime-entry/init.handler.js (10819 bytes). Line 12 imports syncRuntimeSurface. Line 126 calls it. Lines 213-216, 269 reference sync result.

findings.purpose: Doctor handler — repairs recovery state, conditionally calls sync when healthy
findings.evidence: Compiled to dist/features/runtime-entry/doctor.js (5668 bytes). Line 6 imports syncRuntimeSurface. Line 98-100 conditionally calls it. Lines 125-129, 150, 155 reference sync result.

findings.purpose: Core 'false sync' — writes .opencode/plugins/ stub and adds to opencode.json plugin array
findings.evidence: Compiled to dist/features/runtime-observability/sync.js (2486 bytes). Lines 93-107: main function. Lines 24-31: renders 4-line plugin stub. Lines 59-91: syncPluginConfig mutates opencode.json. Conflicts with .opencode/ write prohibition in AGENTS.md.

File extension .deprecated. Zero references in package.json scripts. Zero imports from src/. Companion files also deprecated: check-agent-registry-parity.sh.deprecated (8 lines), check-agent-registry-parity.ts.deprecated (35 lines).

findings.purpose: Standalone legacy CJS CLI — ecosystem verification, path tracing, state inspection, validation, source auditing
findings.evidence: Shipped via package.json 'files' but no bin entry, no script reference, no source import. CJS in ESM project. 1422 lines of untyped JavaScript. Has unique functionality (inspect, validate, ecosystem-check, source-audit) not in TypeScript CLI.

findings.purpose: Registers 4 control-plane primitives with keyword detection, binary aliases, gate resolution
findings.evidence: Compiled to dist/control-plane/. Imported by command-routing.ts, init.handler.ts, control-plane intake/handler. No sync references. Core infrastructure.

false_sync_analysis.what_it_writes: Two artifacts: (1) .opencode/plugins/hivemind-context-governance.ts — a 4-line stub that re-exports from the package entry point; (2) opencode.json — pushes '.opencode/plugins/hivemind-context-governance.ts' into the plugin array if not present.
conflict_reasons: Writes to .opencode/plugins/ without permission.ask — violates AGENTS.md .opencode/ Write Prohibition
Mutates opencode.json without user consent — state mutation should go through permission.ask
Redundant with npm bin registration — 7 bin aliases already register the plugin via package.json
false_sync_analysis.recommendation: Remove entirely. Delete sync command from CLI dispatch. Remove sync calls from init/doctor handlers. Delete runtime-assets.ts bridge. Either refactor sync.ts to read-only status check or delete. Remove hm-sync from package.json bin entries.

unique_functionality: trace-paths — show all .hivemind/ paths with existence checks
verify-install — 6-check install verification (brain, config, plugin, archive, schema)
migrate-check — detect legacy structures needing migration
state load/get/hierarchy — JSON state queries with dot notation
session active/history/trace — session management and stamp grepping
validate schema/chain/stamps — JSON validation and hierarchy chain checks
source-audit — maps src/ files to responsibilities
hivemind_tools_analysis.consumer_evidence: Zero references in src/. Zero references in package.json scripts. Zero references in package.json bin entries. Only referenced in .hivemind/ session artifacts (documentation).
hivemind_tools_analysis.recommendation: DEPRECATE. Rename to .deprecated. Port most valuable commands (ecosystem-check, validate, inspect) into TypeScript CLI in a future phase.

recommended_next_action: Execute Phase 10 (legacy removal) in this order: (1) Remove 3 .deprecated scripts — zero risk. (2) Remove syncRuntimeSurface from init handler and doctor handler. (3) Remove sync command from CLI dispatch and routing. (4) Delete runtime-assets.ts bridge. (5) Refactor or delete sync.ts. (6) Remove hm-sync from package.json bin. (7) Deprecate bin/hivemind-tools.cjs. (8) Run npx tsc --noEmit + npm test gate.
